networks.name: Yazing
networks.notes: Secondary platform. Positions as 100% commission pass-through to affiliates; commission funded by Priority program budget.

commission.notes: 5% on all sales. No tiered, bonus, or seasonal rate structure detected. Unchanged across all 2026 audit cycles.

affiliate_program.shipping: Same business day on orders before 12:00 noon ET

creative_assets.notes: No self-serve public creative library. Priority team available to assist with marketing content. AvantLink dashboard provides banners, product feeds, and deep links to approved affiliates. An alternate program page URL detected this cycle (prioritybicycles.com/pages/affiliate-program vs /pages/affiliate-program-1) — content appears consistent across both.

affiliate_program.approval_requirements: Active website or social channel with original outdoor/recreation content; coupon/rebate/deal-aggregator sites not accepted; manual review via AvantLink

product_catalog.key_differentiator: Low-maintenance Gates Carbon belt drive (rust-free, grease-free) across all models
product_catalog.flagship_ebike: Priority Current Plus E-Bike (750W mid-drive motor, electronic shifting, 600% gear range, ~$3,299)

vs_benchmark.commission: at_median — 5% matches category median; Velowave (7-10%) and Velotric (7%) remain structurally above
vs_benchmark.cookie: below_median — 21 days vs. 30-day category median; 5th consecutive audit cycle with no change
vs_benchmark.aov: below_median on standard line (~$550); above_median on e-bike line (~$3,299 Current Plus = ~$165 EPC)

afare_signals.commission_note: At category median (5%). No improvement trend across 5 audit cycles. Competitors Velowave (7-10%) and Velotric (7%) remain materially more lucrative for e-bike-focused creators.
afare_signals.cookie_note: 21-day cookie — now 5 consecutive audit cycles with no improvement. Below the 30-day category standard. High-consideration bicycle purchases routinely span multiple research sessions; the attribution gap is a compounding deterrent for sophisticated affiliates.
afare_signals.aov_note: Standard bike AOV ~$550 → ~$27.50 EPC at 5%. E-bike Current Plus ~$3,299 → ~$165 EPC. E-bike content remains ~6× more valuable per conversion for affiliate creators.
strengths: Unique belt-drive low-maintenance positioning — strong repeatable content hook for lifestyle, commuter, and parent creators
Same-day shipping + 7-day customer support = conversion-positive proof points for affiliate content
30-day return policy reduces buyer hesitation — easy, confident affiliate recommendation
Affirm financing expands addressable buyer pool on higher-ticket e-bikes
AvantLink is a trusted, fraud-resistant network with deep-link and product-feed tooling
Costco Next listing signals mainstream brand credibility
Yazing secondary platform adds an additional affiliate discovery surface
weaknesses: 21-day cookie stagnant — 5 consecutive audit cycles below the 30-day category standard with zero improvement signal
5% flat commission — no tiered, performance-bonus, or seasonal rate structure ever detected across all 2026 audits
No self-serve creative library; custom asset requests require direct Priority team contact
Single primary network (AvantLink) limits organic affiliate discovery
E-bike high-AOV/EPC opportunity absent from visible affiliate recruitment materials
opportunities: PEAK SPRING WINDOW: April 21 — core spring buying season. Affiliate content live NOW captures prime April/May demand; urgency is high
E-bike EPC: Current Plus at $3,299 × 5% = ~$165 EPC — among highest in DTC bike affiliate space; priority content angle
Travel/lifestyle content via hotel brand partnerships (Starwood, Nantucket) — untapped angle for travel creator segment
Urban car-free lifestyle content — belt-drive narrative resonates with commuter and sustainability audiences
Kids bike segment — rust/grease-free belt drive is a unique safety and zero-maintenance pitch for parent channels
Comparison content (Priority vs. Rad Power, Aventon, Velowave) performs well organically and drives high-intent traffic
threats: Velowave (7-10% / 60-day cookie) and Velotric (7% / 30-day) offer materially better affiliate economics in e-bike segment
Aventon (4% / 30-day) and Rad Power Bikes (5% / 30-day) match or beat Priority cookie window at similar commission rates
Costco Next listing creates price-comparison bypass risk for affiliate link attribution
Program stagnation across 5 audit cycles signals persistently low affiliate channel investment — escalating risk of creator attention migrating to higher-paying programs
No spring 2026 promotional rate, bonus window, or creative campaign detected — missed seasonal amplification opportunity for fifth consecutive Priority audit

changes_since_last_audit.change_summary: No changes detected. Commission (5%), cookie (21 days), networks (AvantLink primary / Yazing secondary), AOV ($550+), payment terms, and all program structure are fully unchanged from 2026-04-19 audit. Minor observation: alternate program page URL (prioritybicycles.com/pages/affiliate-program) confirmed this cycle — content appears identical to the primary /pages/affiliate-program-1 URL, not a new feature. Program has been static with no modifications since at least mid-2024.
changes_since_last_audit.program_stability: high — zero rate changes, network additions, creative library launches, seasonal promotions, or structural modifications observed across all tracked 2026 audit cycles

benchmark_update.notes: bicycles_dtc benchmarks remain accurate. All sources (Priority program page, AvantLink listing, uppromote.com Feb 2026 data) confirm 5% commission / 21-day cookie — consistent with current benchmark values. No update to category-benchmarks.json required this cycle.

recommended_actions: PEAK SEASON URGENCY: April 21 — LiveChannel vendors should have affiliate content live NOW to capture peak spring demand before the window closes in late May
E-bike content focus: Current Plus ~$3,299 at 5% = ~$165 EPC — coach creators to lead with e-bike content, not standard bikes; standard line EPC (~$27.50) is thin

ESCALATE COOKIE CONCERN (5th cycle): Five consecutive audits at 21 days vs. 30-day category standard with zero movement — recommend a formal, direct outreach to Priority affiliate contact requesting a cookie extension as a condition of continued LiveChannel partnership support

Competitive rebalance flag: Velowave (7-10%/60-day) and Velotric (7%/30-day) now offer structurally superior affiliate economics in the e-bike segment — LiveChannel should evaluate rebalancing creator partner recommendations toward these programs for e-bike-focused creators
Monitor AvantLink program dashboard for any spring 2026 promotional rate, bonus period, or creative asset drop — none detected across five consecutive audit cycles to date
